name: Charred okra with tomato, garlic & preserved lemon

ingredients.item: ⅔ oz / 20 g preserved lemon peel (store-bought or see recipe), cut into ⅜-inch / 1cm wedges
ingredients.original: ⅔ oz / 20 g preserved lemon peel (store-bought or see recipe), cut into ⅜-inch / 1cm wedges

ingredients.item: 3 small tomatoes (7 oz / 200 g in total), cut into 8 wedges, or halved cherry tomatoes
ingredients.original: 3 small tomatoes (7 oz / 200 g in total), cut into 8 wedges, or halved cherry tomatoes

ingredients.item: Maldon sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original: Maldon sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
